author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
content: Phase 2 coordinator plan: Launch 5 parallel agents for linalg, fft, random, polynomial, window. All work directly on files (no worktree isolation — git merge blocked by hooks). Agents edit independent crate directories so no conflicts. Note: ferrum-polynomial depends on ferrum-linalg eigvals for root-finding — polynomial agent will implement companion matrix construction assuming linalg provides eigvals. Integration step will verify cross-crate compilation.
